title: ortholoma ambiguum
intro: Ortholoma ambiguum, also known as Orthosiphon aristatus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds such as caffeic acid, rosmarinic acid, and flavonoids, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic properties. Herbal preparations of Ortholoma ambiguum, including teas and extracts, are used to treat various health issues, including urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and high blood pressure.
